creator: sparvu@systemdatarecorder.org
text:
ksh93 port is broken. I cannot install ksh93 under FreeBSd 8.2.
As well the maintainer is not known.

===>  Vulnerability check disabled, database not found
===>  License check disabled, port has not defined LICENSE
=> INIT.2010-03-09.tgz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/ksh93.
=> Attempting to fetch http://www.research.att.com/~gsf/download/tgz//INIT.2010-03-09.tgz
=> Attempting to fetch ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/ksh93//INIT.2010-03-09.tgz
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /usr/ports/distfiles/ksh93 and try again.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/shells/ksh93.



Email to the author of the port:
The original message was received at Mon, 14 Mar 2011 13:09:41 +0200 (EET)
from localhost [127.0.0.1]

   ----- The following addresses had permanent fatal errors -----
<joe@zircon.seattle.wa.us>
    (reason: 550 5.7.1 <joe@zircon.seattle.wa.us>... Relaying denied)

   ----- Transcript of session follows -----
.. while talking to mailhost.org:
   >>> RCPT To:<joe@zircon.seattle.wa.us>
   <<< 550 5.7.1 <joe@zircon.seattle.wa.us>... Relaying denied
   550 5.1.1 <joe@zircon.seattle.wa.us>... User unknown
   >>> DATA
   <<< 503 5.0.0 Need RCPT (recipient)
